evidence.claim: Built semantic search infrastructure using sentence-transformers and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Recently, I built our semantic search infrastructure from scratch — sentence-transformers, FAISS, the works.

evidence.claim: Implemented RAG-based customer support chatbot with document ingestion and answer-generation layers
evidence.source_text: Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system. Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone) and the answer-generation layer (initially GPT-4, then a fine-tuned smaller model for cost control).

evidence.claim: Designed evaluation framework using BLEU, ROUGE, and human-in-the-loop scores
evidence.source_text: Designed the evaluation framework with both automatic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE) and human-in-the-loop quality scores.

evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system for 10M+ users
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users that combined collaborative filtering with content-based ranking.

evidence.claim: Managed feature pipeline with ~200 features and A/B testing infrastructure
evidence.source_text: Most of my time went into the feature pipeline (~200 features) and the A/B testing infrastructure.

evidence.claim: Deployment of RAG chatbot reduced average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Recommendation system launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.

evidence.claim: Self-directed learning through shipping real systems and production load testing
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Completed Deep Learning Specialization and LangChain certification
evidence.source_text: Deep Learning Specialization (Coursera/DeepLearning.AI, 2020); LangChain for LLM Application Development (DeepLearning.AI, 2021)
I've spent enough time debugging production ranking issues to know which signals matter and which are noise.
